statement: In every magma, Equation 2569 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * x)) * z`) implies Equation 866 (`x = x * ((y * z) * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0461
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op y z) (op w z)))
